title: Question: Open64 compiler with verilator
body:
---


Author Name: **Frederic Requin**
Original Redmine Message: 1182 from https://www.veripool.org



---

Hello,
I now use verilator on a server with 4 x AMD 6828 SE under Linux.
By moving from a Windows PC with an i5 750 to the server, I had a performance boost of ~ 3x.
I had an additional performace boost of ~ 2.5x by using the Open64 compiler.
For those who are interested, here is my compile script:

```
#! /bin/sh

#verilator tb_top.v -cc -trace -O3 -top-module top_v -exe main.cpp
verilator tb_top.v -cc -O3 -top-module top_v -exe main.cpp
cd ./obj_dir
CXX=openCC
LINK=openCC
export CXX
export LINK
make -e -j -f Vtop_v.mk Vtop_v
cd ..


```
Regards,

Frederic
code_blocks:
